textByHashes.9eeb6085c18e242ac101ad591d06fda9f7378661: So, this is grand isn't it?
textByHashes.1bb66a0d963fc516dfb28d7811d6e8d0a3899c63: I'd say it's one of my finest yet, though I do wish more of the guests could've made it. However, it looks like we've gained a bit of a straggler.
textByHashes.bff7f9af5cf6efc01036d1a0cf06f7ca551062e8: Yes, that slightly pompous fellow that hasn't introduced himself to anyone yet. The fact that he's here means he must have gained an invitation, though I don't know how...
textByHashes.6618ea95ee8f78092c231da6a50b81e1036495fc: I'm sure it won't be! I'm always open to meeting new people, especially those who enjoy the arts.
textByHashes.be021982b67b208faadc8dfa2e5345e059dd74f7: I can't believe it! How could he not even know the name of his gracious host?
textByHashes.c052acf75416cabf9063d3a78fa98b98f16ed0cf: He's an actor you say? Ah, now that explains why he was so eager to be here. Well, if he's good, this might be his lucky day. I, Constantinius, am in the market for a new actor to sponsor.
textByHashes.726033a657cb94beb9ecd8719047bf2539a5a683: Well, you know actors. Very profitable once they're popular. I like to... make investments.
textByHashes.eecb78bc8db24fd9ae582224391b94d7993647f1: For example, I've sponsored tonight's lead actor, Livius, for some time. He's done very well for himself, and for me, though he's almost too expensive for me these days.
textByHashes.2bcbdba542b6a28e83650252014847e9ff403cca: Anyway, perhaps you'll see him tonight on stage!
textByHashes.9dd1b1231c1e4804e85482ab3f5e5ec8bf86fe7f: Whenever we have a new play to unveil! I've got a couple of creatives from Tempestus that can write up a storm, so I find myself hosting these events more and more!
textByHashes.add5211022fc6cbca9b88a08e579ac7baa67d350: Normally we just send the invitations out to all the villas on the island! If you can afford one, then you're welcome here.
textByHashes.18abd9d8d3d0323bb4d17003d5005dda9da95d1a: You must try to change that before next time. After all, the more the merrier.
textByHashes.eb6531bce5fac2f2d50c676029de507da00f63e7: Well, we sadly had a few who couldn't attend this time, so I'm actually quite glad you're here. Still, I wouldn't mind knowing how your employer managed to acquire an invitation...
textByHashes.15eeb2d53590fa937fe8e0faad701806a653208b: Perhaps so. After all, the more the merrier.
textByHashes.06c81cd6ec54e613b367045bca7be1367e1908ec: Oh poor Livius! Where am I to find another actor of his calibre?
textByHashes.f0f2288e6c507a92da8992d7d5d2740a2e9765b3: I may have had some quibbles with how expensive his performances were, but he always made a profit!
textByHashes.2c1dd73d39886ed01d00d2f6d9a5ec9f17a82684: I can only hope his understudy is capable of filling the gap that's going to be left. Livius always kept her in the shadows, though he did say that she was nearly ready for a leading role of her own...
textByHashes.831fc11434c7484a7c6101bfee0727b580b53f98: I'd sponsored him for years, yes.
textByHashes.5680c38ff2832bcbf3da999af89ccce29d261af7: Well, I can't say I wasn't profiting from it. Although I do admit that he'd become a little... excessive with his spending in recent times.
textByHashes.80322aa4b26450718bfe1549f2b98817655d733b: The thought has crossed my mind, but he was still profitable, and it's not like I couldn't just sponsor a second actor in addition to him anyway.
textByHashes.275a2dca58427170695d85430b676f4b58124120: I wasn't tied to him... If I'd wanted to stop sponsoring him, I'd have just done that. There would have been no need to kill him...
textByHashes.2b1adfee09f16bd89851fc5826ac3e474a33571e: I can't deny that it has very much enhanced the event, but do you think I'd have someone killed just for a social function?
textByHashes.adab0f7133bbb986ddbc960d527d913a63639ce8: You're the one accusing me, . You should know.
textByHashes.697f5f48070151984ce8d5763020b0ca3ae4e370: Haven't you already tried to accuse me?
textByHashes.4130631cffd87163bb5b010b57c7092ccef0bc9a: Does this mean we can get on with tonight's play?
textByHashes.26b6e5c1797fbbb706fb62a20aad3c90f09dcb20: Yes, it is a bit of a last minute issue, but I have no doubt that Livius' understudy will be able to step up.
textByHashes.df1108cda9b9556ae429d27718faa8f8e14498d3: Well, you've been doing a wonderful job so far, so I'm sure if the villain is still loose, you'll catch them.
textByHashes.bf7c1f1da9c7e3ac8abdbf3037c2a60b1c45ff00: That's not a problem. You can easily keep everyone in the theatre. The only place they'd be able to run to from there is straight off the cliff!
textByHashes.bc03251cc747f20aebb40996fca4c25bff4e781a: It's settled then! We will proceed with the play! While we do that, if the killer is still at large, the ever capable here will ensure they are dealt with!
textByHashes.b924595f58125753b7246fd4869a3f124babf423: Oh, no, you can't come with us. I don't want your investigation disrupting things. You'll need to stay out of sight. Why don't you take the back way?
textByHashes.609d9689b406edda0c806924047fa87058bf51d0: Yes! It's not been used in a while, so it's a little bit precarious these days, but I'm sure you'll manage.
textByHashes.4fd9f7f3e5160723061ca072b5ab1b5ff4b8fc70: I don't think this was in the original script...
textByHashes.27d6424717f63798a16131aa69b6e0981499a859: Well, I never imagined you'd be quite the actor!
textByHashes.e98248b49eed8cba990d8c26b64497e25cefe171: I don't suppose you'd like to be acting here in the future? To be honest, I'd prefer you to that odd fellow that brought you to my door.
textByHashes.0e74ebb03e034eea0b2838447cc3ff149b9e730c: Anyway, do feel free to wander around the villa whenever you fancy. I don't recommend drinking from the wine fountain though.
